text: I feel a quiet anticipation. The dimly lit hallway in the first image stirs a sense of solitude and contemplation, as if I stand at the threshold of knowledge or possibility, surrounded by the hum of potential energy. Moving into the second space, the R+D wall and the curious interplay of text and technology spark my imagination. I feel small but connected—just another node in the network of curiosity, progress, and perpetual questioning.
